description:
Model a chimney and a water-diverting cricket on the south face of a gable roof, then place a solar array that avoids both.

Instructions:
1. A starting model is generated for you at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gable_building.skp' (it will open automatically).
2. Model a Chimney (approx 1.0m wide x 0.6m deep) on the south-facing roof slope. It should extend vertically above the roof ridge.
3. Model a Cricket (a triangular/wedge structure) on the upslope side of the chimney (between the chimney and the ridge) to divert water.
4. Use the Skelion plugin to populate the south roof face with solar panels in Portrait orientation.
5. Ensure NO panels overlap or intersect with the chimney or the cricket. Delete or exclude panels from that zone.
6. Save your completed model exactly as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\chimney_cricket_solar.skp'.
